name: Windows - AppLocker
summary: Application Monitoring in Windows for your Testing Environment
description: Successfully create an Application inventory to protect against unwanted software, enforce licensing conformance, achieve software standardization and improve manageability.

summary.@value: This Dashboard aggregates all available information collected from Windows Endpoints regarding applications controlled by Applocker.

query.query_string: _exists_:appbase AND NOT (appbase:SYSTEM32 OR appbase:PROGRAMFILES OR appbase:WINDIR)
_exists_:apppath AND _exists_:appbase AND _exists_:appname AND NOT (appbase:SYSTEM32 OR appbase:PROGRAMFILES OR appbase:WINDIR)
_exists_:apppath AND _exists_:appbase AND NOT (appbase:SYSTEM32 OR appbase:PROGRAMFILES OR appbase:WINDIR)

widget.2b197ea4-e8ca-451f-8ba4-4b8832836695: Messages for Severity:undefined AND source:undefined AND user_name:undefined AND NOT _exists_:apppath
widget.b4a880cc-2fc5-48ac-b5cc-0e448edc48d8: Messages for source:appserver1.demo.io AND appextension:EXE AND appname:CACHESET64

query.query_string: _exists_:apppath AND _exists_:appbase AND NOT (appbase:SYSTEM32 OR appbase:PROGRAMFILES OR appbase:WINDIR)
_exists_:apppath AND _exists_:appbase AND _exists_:appname AND NOT (appbase:SYSTEM32 OR appbase:PROGRAMFILES OR appbase:WINDIR)
_exists_:appbase AND NOT (appbase:SYSTEM32 OR appbase:PROGRAMFILES OR appbase:WINDIR)

description.@value: Microsoft provides Applocker as solution to enforce Application Whitelisting. This allows to fully control Applications and Scripts being executed on all Windows Systems being managed by Applocker. This Dashboard provides insights to proactively enabling all required applications as well as identifying attempts to run unauthorized executables.

source.@value:
pipeline "Windows - Applocker"
stage 20 match pass
rule "Windows - Applocker - NXLog - Normalization 21"
rule "Windows - Applocker - Winlogbeat - Normalization 22"
stage 80 match pass
rule "Windows - AppLocker - NXLog - Field Cleanup 81"
stage 90 match pass
rule "Windows - AppLocker - Routing 91"
rule "Windows - AppLocker - Routing 92"
stage 30 match pass
rule "Windows - AppLocker - Parsing 31"
rule "Windows - AppLocker - Parsing 32"
end

rule "Windows - AppLocker - NXLog - Field Cleanup 81"

when
    to_string($message.SourceName) == "Microsoft-Windows-AppLocker"

then
    remove_field("full_message");
    remove_field("Channel");
    
end

description.@value: Removing from Stream "Illuminate:Windows Event Log Messages" identified by Stream ID

source.@value:
rule "Windows - AppLocker - Routing 92"

when
    to_string($message.SourceName) == "Microsoft-Windows-AppLocker" OR
    to_string($message.winlogbeat_event_provider) == "Microsoft-Windows-AppLocker"

then
    remove_from_stream(
        id: "642a9944b487b336a83e66f6"
    );
    
end

description.@value: Applocker EventID 8002 - 8007 ; Fields: appbase, appname, appextension
Applocker EventID 8002 - 8007; Fields: apppath, appname (to catch Powershell Script Policy Tests)
Routing to Stream "Windows - Applocker" identified by Stream ID

source.@value:
rule "Windows - AppLocker - Routing 91"

when
    to_string($message.SourceName) == "Microsoft-Windows-AppLocker" OR
    to_string($message.winlogbeat_event_provider) == "Microsoft-Windows-AppLocker"

then
    route_to_stream(
        id: "643d075d6f5dab51662c827e"
    );
    
end

default_template.@value:
# Needed for Graylog
fields_under_root: true
fields.collector_node_id: ${sidecar.nodeName}
fields.gl2_source_collector: ${sidecar.nodeId}

output.logstash:
   hosts: ["graylog.demo.io:5044"]
path:
  data: ${sidecar.spoolDir!"C:\\Program Files\\Graylog\\sidecar\\cache\\winlogbeat"}\data
  logs: ${sidecar.spoolDir!"C:\\Program Files\\Graylog\\sidecar"}\logs
tags:
 - windows
winlogbeat:
  event_logs:
   - name: Application
   - name: System
   - name: Security

define ROOT C:\Program Files\Nxlog

Moduledir %ROOT%\modules
CacheDir %ROOT%\data
Pidfile %ROOT%\data\nxlog.pid
SpoolDir %ROOT%\data
LogFile %ROOT%\data\nxlog.log
LogLevel INFO

<Extension logrotate>
    Module  xm_fileop
    <Schedule>
        When    @daily
        Exec    file_cycle('%ROOT%\data\nxlog.log', 7);
     </Schedule>
</Extension>


<Extension gelfExt>
  Module xm_gelf
  # Avoid truncation of the short_message field to 64 characters.
  ShortMessageLength 65536
</Extension>

<Input eventlog>
        Module im_msvistalog
        PollInterval 1
        SavePos True
        ReadFromLast True
        
        #Channel System
        #<QueryXML>
        #  <QueryList>
        #   <Query Id='1'>
        #    <Select Path='Security'>*[System/Level=4]</Select>
        #    </Query>
        #  </QueryList>
        #</QueryXML>
</Input>


<Input file>
	Module im_file
	File 'C:\Windows\MyLogDir\\*.log'
	PollInterval 1
	SavePos	True
	ReadFromLast True
	Recursive False
	RenameCheck False
	Exec $FileName = file_name(); # Send file name with each message
</Input>


<Output gelf>
	Module om_tcp
	Host graylog.demo.io
	Port 12201
	OutputType  GELF_TCP
	<Exec>
	  # These fields are needed for Graylog
	  $gl2_source_collector = '${sidecar.nodeId}';
	  $collector_node_id = '${sidecar.nodeName}';
	</Exec>
</Output>


<Route route-1>
  Path eventlog => gelf
</Route>
<Route route-2>
  Path file => gelf
</Route>

template.@value:
define ROOT C:\Program Files\Nxlog

Moduledir %ROOT%\modules
CacheDir %ROOT%\data
Pidfile %ROOT%\data\nxlog.pid
SpoolDir %ROOT%\data
LogFile %ROOT%\data\nxlog.log
LogLevel INFO

<Extension logrotate>
    Module  xm_fileop
    <Schedule>
        When    @daily
        Exec    file_cycle('%ROOT%\data\nxlog.log', 7);
     </Schedule>
</Extension>


<Extension gelfExt>
  Module xm_gelf
  ShortMessageLength 65536
</Extension>

<Input eventlog>
    Module im_msvistalog
    PollInterval 1
    SavePos True
    ReadFromLast True

    <QueryXML>
        <QueryList>
          <Query Id="0">
            <Select Path="Microsoft-Windows-AppLocker/EXE and DLL">*</Select>
            <Select Path="Microsoft-Windows-AppLocker/MSI and Script">*</Select>
          </Query>
          <Query Id="1">
             <Select Path="Security">*</Select>
             <Select Path="System">*</Select>
             <Select Path="Application">*</Select>
          </Query>
        </QueryList>
    </QueryXML>
</Input>


<Input file>
	Module im_file
	File 'C:\Program Files\Graylog\sidecar\logs\sidecar.log'
	PollInterval 1
	SavePos	True
	ReadFromLast True
	Recursive False
	RenameCheck False
	Exec $FileName = file_name();
</Input>


<Output gelf>
	Module om_tcp
	Host graylog.demo.io
	Port 12201
	OutputType  GELF_TCP
	<Exec>
	  # These fields are needed for Graylog
	  $gl2_source_collector = '${sidecar.nodeId}';
	  $collector_node_id = '${sidecar.nodeName}';
	</Exec>
</Output>


<Route route-1>
  Path eventlog => gelf
</Route>
<Route route-2>
  Path file => gelf
</Route>

# Needed for Graylog
fields_under_root: true
fields.collector_node_id: ${sidecar.nodeName}
fields.gl2_source_collector: ${sidecar.nodeId}

output.logstash:
   hosts: ["graylog.demo.io:5044"]
path:
  data: ${sidecar.spoolDir!"C:\\Program Files\\Graylog\\sidecar\\cache\\winlogbeat"}\data
  logs: ${sidecar.spoolDir!"C:\\Program Files\\Graylog\\sidecar"}\logs
tags:
 - windows
 - applocker
winlogbeat:
  event_logs:
   - name: Application
   - name: System
   - name: Security
   - name: Microsoft-Windows-AppLocker/EXE and DLL
   - name: Microsoft-Windows-AppLocker/MSI and Script

description.@value: Default Windows Event Log Messages. Contains all Windows Event Log messages not routed to other streams.
